import io
import string
import list

fn find_max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut best = 0
  mut best_val = match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    let cur = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if cur > best_val
      best_val = cur
      best = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != idx
      let v = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k_raw = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut take = k_raw
  if take > nums.len()
    take = nums.len()
  end
  if take < 0
    take = 0
  end

  mut remaining = nums
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < take
    let idx = find_max_index(remaining)
    let val = match remaining.get(idx)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(output)
end
